# Appendix

Modules that are re-exported from the `breos` namespace but aren't part of
the primary puzzle-piece surface — utilities, I/O helpers, model constants,
and research-validation modules.

```{eval-rst}
.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/
   :recursive:

   breos.utils
   breos.io
   breos.constants
   breos.polysun_degradation
```
